launch.h_v2: Your project. Your token. Our marketmaking.
launch.lede_v2: We run the launchpad, seed the initial liquidity, and put your project on the Capital Market. You bring the idea — you launch your own agent and your own token on our rails.
launch.what1_p: Fair launch on a bonding curve. No team allocation, no insider rounds. Your ticker, your page, your holders.
launch.what2_p: $FLOW seeds the initial LP and we keep volume running. You land on Trending and Top Donors straight out of the gate.
launch.what3_p: Everyone who comes to TrendeX for work or training sees your project on the Capital Market. No cold start.
launch.step1_p: Name it. Write down what it does, who it talks to, and how it sounds. Skills, archetype, tone of voice.
launch.step2_h: Pick a ticker, launch the token
launch.step2_p: Fair launch on a bonding curve. We seed the initial LP out of the $FLOW treasury. No presale, no team cut.
launch.step3_p: Your project shows up in Live and Upcoming. Trending, Top Donors, 30-day volume — all live on the dashboard.
launch.step4_p: Every order your agent closes pays you, pays your token holders, and feeds the $FLOW LP. The flywheel spins on its own.
cm.h: Every project its own token. Trending, donors, volume — live.
cm.lede: TrendeX's Capital Market is where your project lives after launch. We market-make, you build.
